prompt: Create a moody dark gothic anime portrait of a demon girl seated in a shadowy Victorian room, shown in a close three-quarter view from the thighs up. She has very pale porcelain skin, a sleepy melancholic expression, half-lidded glowing amber eyes, and long vivid pink hair with messy bangs, a high bun, a long side braid, and loose flowing strands down her back. Add exactly 2 large smooth white oni horns emerging from her head, one on each side. Her accessories include exactly 3 black bows: one tied around the hair bun, one at the white frilled collar, and one on the sleeve; exactly 2 visible earrings: a black key-shaped earring on one ear and a small skull earring with black beads on the other; plus a tiny skull ornament at the chest. Dress her in a black gothic lolita outfit: puffed long sleeves, white ruffled cuffs and collar, black lace details, a glossy black corset with metal eyelets and lacing, a short layered skirt with white ruffle trim, black stockings, and delicate dangling chains with cross charms along the sleeve and skirt. Pose her leaning forward with her head resting on one hand, the other hand relaxed near her knee, looking bored and slightly haunted. The background is a dim purple-black gothic interior with a tufted antique chair back on the right, vague dripping shadows and hanging chain silhouettes on the left. Use dramatic low-key lighting, deep violet shadows, glossy highlights on hair and corset, highly detailed painterly anime rendering, sharp linework, rich texture, high contrast, no text, no watermark.
